headline: Southern Company Expands Battery Storage to Boost Grid Strength
summary: SO's Georgia Power begins a major battery storage project in Wadley, enhancing grid reliability and supporting renewable energy growth across the state.

headline: Duke Energy Stock Rises 11.7% in 3 Months: Should You Buy Now?
summary: DUK gains 11.7% in 3 months as nuclear strength and aggressive renewable expansion plans boost its clean energy outlook and long-term growth prospects.
